entries.source: "Opportunity cost"
entries.value: "अवसर लागत (Opportunity cost)"

entries.source: "Should a company enter this market?"
entries.value: "के कम्पनीले यो बजारमा प्रवेश गर्नुपर्छ?"

entries.source: "What makes an argument valid?"
entries.value: "तर्कलाई के कुराले वैध बनाउँछ?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Socratic Instruction on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Foundations learning का लागि inspir मा Socratic Instruction प्रयोग गर्ने व्यावहारिक guide, prompt, study loop र सुरक्षित AI बानी सहित।

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: अझ बलियो study loop

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI शिक्षक

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: final answer भन्दा सानो first step माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: AI लाई result मात्र होइन, तपाईंको reasoning check गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Build a hypothesis.
entries.value: hypothesis बनाउनुहोस्।

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: memory बाट idea फिर्ता लेखेर finish गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: आधारभूत कुराहरू

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: कुनै विषयलाई गहिरिएर सोच्न, धारणाहरू परीक्षण गर्न र दिगो बुझाइ निर्माण गर्न चाहने विद्यार्थीहरू।

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: try गर्ने prompts

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Deeper Understanding का लागि Socratic AI Tutor निष्क्रिय उत्तर सङ्कलनको सट्टा सिकाइका लागि AI प्रयोग गर्ने केन्द्रित तरिका हो। यो mode एउटा स्पष्ट काम वरिपरि बनाइएको छ: concept, argument, problem, text, वा decision लाई focused chain of questions मा बदल्नुहोस्। तपाईंको buddy ले each answer सुन्छ, assumptions र gaps map गर्छ, र तपाईंलाई आफ्नै final synthesis तर्फ push गर्छ। प्रयास गर्नुहोस्: "Help me understand opportunity cost."

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding: practical guide
entries.value: Deeper Understanding का लागि Socratic AI Tutor: व्यावहारिक guide

entries.source: Socratic Instruction
entries.value: सोक्रेटिक निर्देशन

entries.source: Start the live mode at Socratic Instruction. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Collaborative Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Socratic Instruction मा live mode सुरु गर्नुहोस्। neighbouring learning format चाहनुहुन्छ भने Collaborative Instruction try गर्नुहोस्। platform को broader view का लागि AI learning companion ले सबैका लागि के गर्नुपर्छ पढ्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: mode लाई तपाईं के सिक्न वा produce गर्न खोज्दै हुनुहुन्छ भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: त्यो difference flow मा देखिन्छ। एउटा giant response को सट्टा best sessions loop हुँदै अघि बढ्छन्: goal set गर्नुहोस्, केही try गर्नुहोस्, feedback पाउनुहोस्, weak spot repair गर्नुहोस्, र next action choose गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: त्यो focus महत्त्वपूर्ण छ। general chatbot ले लगभग सबै कुरा answer गर्न सक्छ, तर learning mode ले conversation लाई shape दिन्छ। यसले idea stick हुन मद्दत गर्ने thinking, practice, feedback, वा exploration तर्फ तपाईंलाई nudge गर्छ।

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: शिक्षकले एक पटकमा एउटा प्रश्न सोध्छन्, तपाईंको तर्कको प्रतीक्षा गर्छन्, र तपाईंले प्रयास गरिसकेपछि मात्र निष्कर्ष निकाल्छन्।

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: यो cheating नगरी AI सँग study गर्ने same habit हो: learner active राख्नुहोस्। AI तपाईंको thinking मा feedback दिँदा सबैभन्दा useful हुन्छ।

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: यो mode विशेष रूपमा यस्ता learners का लागि useful छ जो चाहन्छन्:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: चरणलाई आफ्नै शब्दमा प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Turn confusion into a clearer model.
entries.value: अलमललाई स्पष्ट model मा बदल्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use hints before answers.
entries.value: उत्तरभन्दा पहिले hints प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use Socratic Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: छिटो सुरु हुने तर तपाईंअनुसार adapt हुने session चाहनुहुन्छ भने Socratic Instruction प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्। पहिलो goal प्रभावशाली सुनिनु होइन। पहिलो goal अर्को step सम्भव महसुस गराउनु हो।

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: यो mode ले केमा मद्दत गर्छ

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: अब कहाँ जाने

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: तपाईं आफ्नो वास्तविक समस्याको rough version बाट पनि सुरु गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ। messy first prompt ठीकै छ। सुरु गरेपछि session ले level, audience, deadline, र style clarify गर्न सक्छ।
